verdict: An incredibly lazy and repetitive chart plagued by duplicate note bugs, lack of pattern variety, and an illegal 3-panel chord.

issues.problem: Extremely repetitive mapping where almost the entire main chorus consists of alternating JUMP LR and tap U, resulting in a tedious 'jackhammer' effect.
An illegal 3-panel chord (JUMP LR and HOLD D occurring simultaneously) which is unplayable under standard 4-panel single rules.
Dozens of duplicate note events (JUMP LR mapped twice at the exact same millisecond), pointing to a technical generation error.
Severe lack of jump variety; JUMP LR is used almost exclusively, ignoring comfortable alternatives like UD, LD, or RD, which creates poor foot flow.
